message:
fix: suppress DB-backed config and prefix detection when no-db is active

config list/get (build_layers), br info, and br where all previously
ignored no-db mode when resolving the DB config layer or detecting the
issue prefix. Each command now computes the effective no_db flag from
the merged startup + CLI config before loading DB data, so --no-db
and project-level no-db: true are consistently honoured across all
read paths. audit summary switches to open_storage_ctx_with_auto_import
for consistency. event_type_style now uses theme colours instead of
hardcoded Color::parse literals.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
